entry.title: Re: Automatic Account Determination content download - S4...
entry.content:
Hi Peter,

Please use the process navigator https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402?region=US and go to the accelerator section and under the reference section, there is an excel file with the GL account details. This excel file has many tabs and the tabs towards the end provide a copy of the account determination in the system which is provided as the reference content. This can be your starting point.

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Creating Purchase Order Header text ID's in SAP S4 HA...
entry.content:
Hello Chetan,

We have received similar question in our community and we also have some blogs which can help you to create Purchase Order Header text ID's.

I suggest you check the following links:

Output Management – Customize Content Form with additional fields 

S/4HANA Cloud Output Management - Purchase Order 

I hope the above blogs help you.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: Long-term loans in a Budget Control System
entry.content:
With this kind of G/L acount we want use WEB elements, but I can not discart that in the future we may use Cost Centers alone with balance G/L accounts.

thank you

entry.title: Re: Long-term loans in a Budget Control System
entry.content: * WBS elements

entry.title: Re: SAP-GUI Single Sign-On based on SSL certificates and SNC
entry.content:
Great blog!

However, "SAP Single Sign-On 3.0" is a solution you have to buy, else you can't download it.

Thanks a lot for the detailed explanation!

entry.title: Visual Studio Code - SAP Fiori elements
entry.content:
Good morning, the service created in sap in transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE is active,
working, code 200 ok, however, when using visual studio code the service is not available, 
with the error:
Authentication incorrect! AxiosError: Request failed with status code 403

I connected via on premise, it connected well to the sap client, 
but the service was unavailable, could someone please help me.

Grateful

entry.title: Re: Builds rejected by Apple with two similar warnings on two apps, previously with no problems
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/missing-purpose-string-in-info-plist/m-p/13637570/highlight/true#M915

entry.title: Re: Long-term loans in a Budget Control System
entry.content: Doesn't matter... if you put WBS in earmarked fund, the system will require G/L account, which is a cost element, but once more, this info is not of any importance, while it can still serve you for your derivation rules

entry.title: Re: block delivery proposal in Sales Ordem if Customer no...
entry.content: In configuration for Credit Management ova8, you can set whether the message can be a warning or error if the credit limit is exceeded

entry.title: Forward Candidates as Applicant with Integration Center
entry.content:
We have configured in a system an Evergreen Job Requisition template and a Child Job Requisition Template. We create different child Job Requisitions and link them to the Evergreen Job Requisition. The Job Requisition Evergreen is the one that is posted on the Career Site, while the Child is not. The candidates apply to the Job Requisition Evergreen and with an integration in the Integration Center we have managed to automatically forward the candidates to the corresponding child job requisition, using the country as a filter. To perform this integration we have used the JobReqFwdCandidates entity, the problem is that with this entity the candidate's application data is not forwarded from one job requisition to the other, that is, it acts as the functionality of Forward to Requisition and not as Forward as Applicant.

 

Is there a different entity in the Integration Center to be able to forward the candidates as applicant from an Evergreen Job Requisition to a Child Job Requisition? Or is there another way to make this automatic within the system without being a manual forward?

 

Thank you very much in advance

entry.title: Re: How to define the flexible workflow for "parked/ Park...
entry.content:
Hello Prasad,

We have some sources of documentation that can help you to define the flexible workflow for "parked/ Parked and completed" supplier invoices. Please check the following Links:

How to Configure the Flexible Workflow for Supplier Invoices 

Workflow Features for Supplier Invoices (Parked as Complete) 

Supplier Invoice Flexible Workflow for Parked Invoice as Complete - Community Blog 

I hope with the above information you will be able to define your flexible workflow.

Kind regards.

entry.title: filling up free capacity with producing requests earlier than the latest date
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

having the following request. 

Capacity in the production was estimated to high - but the employees cannot be sent home, but production should produce requirements earlier. IBP usually produces at the latest possible date. Can it be defined via a parameter so that requirements are brought forward (= produced earlier) within a defined time horizon in order to utilize the free capacity. With the effect that produced goods lay in the warehouse a little bit longer. 

Is it possible to customize this in IBP-order-based - in which Fiori-app?

Thanks.

Jo

entry.title: Re: Post size in Service Layer session
entry.content:
Hello!

I have the same problem, were you able to solve it?

Thanks since now.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I would like to get certified in SAP MM and I saw the opportunity of getting a free SAP Certification attempt which I would want to pursue. 

Kind regards,

Chipo

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

i am registrated as student since 2 weeks. My target is to have the SAP S/4 HANA Quality Management. i booked a Certification hub subscription for students, but i still don't have access to the learning jouney to prepare for the Exam.

I thought as student i have a free access for Learning Hub Jounrneys (my university is a member of the SAP University Alliances program). I don't know how can i learn for the exam.

Thank you for Helping

entry.title: Message =Data loss occurred when converting 20244900000941
entry.content:
I am Trying to create a custom situation handling scenario where a notification will be triggered after every FG Goods movement, it will help the Logistic team to plan dispatch activities.

For this purpose I have created a custom situation object using Event Object "CL_MMIM_MATDOC_EVENT" i.e Material Document Created. And further created Situation Scenario and Type Accordingly. When I run the Situation type using batch trigger i get the appropriate notification

 

But when triggering an Event I get the following Error "Message =Data loss occurred when converting 20244900000941" it is unable to separate Document Year and Number.

Thanks & Regards

Ashish Talekar

Situation Handling SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud @Saumitra

entry.title: Has anyone pulled in performance data or data from other modules into EC workflows?
entry.content: The only way i can think of doing this would be to add a custom field to the comp portlet and then have it populated annually. Can anyone think of another way which doesn't involve adding a custom field in EC?

entry.title: Re: Securing external RFC connections, including certificate-based authentication
entry.content:
Great Post!

Which is the "User Type" for the RFCUSER?
If you set "User Type" = "Communication Data", password could expire.

Is it better to deactivate password if you use certificate to authenticate form external RFC coonections?

Thanks

Mario

entry.title: Re: Quick/express guide on How to configure customized fields on the new Redesigned Applicant Manage
entry.content: Thank you! This is helpful. Will candidateSource be available at some point to add?

entry.title: Re: New to the SAP Community? A friend of someone already here?
entry.content: Hello, I have been with SAP Dallas for 23 years. Here is a summary of my professional experience. I have worked in a multi-disciplinary capacity across customer lifecycle support and designed and executed programs for security, contract and regulatory compliance. I have delivered process transformation and automation initiatives, using an MVP approach and innovative technologies (e.g., AI/ML). I have established high-performance teams from the ground up and led them to operational excellence. I am interested in sharing my expertise with the extended SAP community.

entry.title: Re: Target Cost in CO-production order
entry.content: KKPAN my friend.  Award points.

entry.title: Re: I dream with a "Parameterized" Task Chain
entry.content:
Hello Xavi,

The behavior you described can be achieved using Data Flow Input parameters. This means that you will need to create a separate Data flow for each parameter default value and then combine them in Task Chain.

For the corresponding ETL logic to be reusable across different Data Flows you can create a SQL view.

entry.title: Change name for Fiscal year field
entry.content:
Is it possible to amend the fiscal year field to present as 2020_2021 instead of DIGITS? or DIGITS-DIGITS instead of just DIGITS?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change name for Fiscal year field
entry.content:
You cannot modify the standard field names as it will change the names for all customer's system.

We request you to post your requirement in our Influence sap :  https://influence.sap.com/

entry.title: Re: Printing Transfer Order in warehouse management.
entry.content:
How  can  I configure  to a specific  report be userd  in many languages ?

Thanks

 

Marcos

entry.title: Re: Builds Failing with new runtime
entry.content:
We are also experiencing failing web builds, in two of our applications (basically all of our applications). The error code is the most frequent one, that has been reported by me a few days ago. 

Should we also send information about our application for further analysis?

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
@giangrandinetti , I don't see any impact on Goal Management if you decide not to use any of the newer skills functionality or decide to 'opt-out' for the time being. TIH will not change anything automatically in GM. I suggest referring to my latest blog, that might help with your answer- 

Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub - Myths and Misconceptions - Part 1 (Prerequisites)
entry.content: Indeed, a much-needed post, since the fear of change towards the unknown and new might prevent customers from moving towards TIH, whereas in reality not being 100% ready with everything is not a show-stopper. Getting started and building on the go is a more attainable approach. And your post builds confidence in consultants as well, to propose this solution more often. Thank you, Dalibor!

entry.title: Processing of Success record after a Failure Exception
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

I have a flow in SAP CPI where we are picking the file form SFTP location, splitting the files using Generic Splitter and for each //Condition_Record_no. Based on the requirement, the flow either goes to POST or PATCH and updates in S4hana using OData.

When a record with incorrect data is passed ,the messages is handled in exception sub process and the subsequent records are not being processed.

Example:

Suppose if there are 10 records in a file with 1-8 records having success data and 9th having error data .
10 record having success data.
Current Working scenario : file is getting processed and till 8 records are getting updated in S4.
since 9th record has failure ,the messages is going to define d exception and ending.
Proposed Scenario: After 9th record fails it should send error log mail to users and continue to process the 10th record. If there are more than one error record need to collate all the records log into one do and send mail

Attaching the CPI flow screenshots for reference.

 

Can you please help on this.

entry.title: Re: New to the SAP Community? A friend of someone already here?
entry.content: @Geeta_Menon great to meet you in community! Looking forward to you parting your wisdom with community members. Did you get a chance to engage in this group Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - SAP Community? Be sure to join the group to stay up to the latest. Also, I want to introduce you to SAP Champion @SergioG_TX in case you don't yet know each other. Its pretty cool that you are coming at SAP in different ways and I bet you have a lot in common too. 😎#AI/ML

entry.title: Re: Change value of fields of an internal table without loop
entry.content: To get better performance, SAP is suggested to go with CDS view. Try this approach and see if your problem can solve

entry.title: /SCWM/R_ODO_POST_GI use on older release
entry.content:
Hi folks,

The report /SCWM/R_ODO_POST_GI is available for S/4HANA 2022 release. Is there a way to install this report on S/4HANA 2021 SP2?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Not able to connect S4/HANA (on-prem) as content provider
entry.content: hey @marvin_heibert, du you solved the "no suitable resource found" problem? I am struggling with the same issue and would be interested in ur solution. BR Tom

entry.title: Re: Correct usage of SBO_Application.RemoveWindowsMessage
entry.content:
Hi iNDdM,

Instead of it, you can create a ProgressBar and keep sending the message to UI API which will keep it active and your add-on will not crash.

Refer to the SDK help file for ProgressBar object.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello, I live in Parker, Texas, USA and am associated with the SAP Plano office. Parker is not as urban as Plano and allows for larger home sites with greenery, so I love living here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business one 10 FP 2311 bypassing authentication while accessing DTW
entry.content:
Hi bejjanijoseph,

Are you having the issue on SP2311?

Can you please share the screenshot for the issue?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Migrating from groups to spaces and pages - Why, When, and Key Diffe
entry.content:
hi @Jocelyn_Dart 

you are saying the following: "as an administrator you can decide to disable personalization completely for the users and with this all spaces and pages would be locked. There is one exception: the “My Home” space can still be personalized, even if personalization has been disabled completely by the administrator. This means, if you disable personalization of pages, then all spaces and pages will be locked, except the “My Home” space."

I am currently working on a project and we are implementing spaces (on S/4HANA 2021 SP2). The aim is to block personalization (no more moving tiles around) but the users to still be able to add /remove tiles from Home space. 

I have tried by using the SAP standard catalog /UI2/CONFIG_PERS_OFF, which indeed deactivates the personalization... more exactly it disables/removed the App Finder button. After that you can still edit the My Home page BUT you can't add anymore tiles, the Add tile button is gone.

So, how can I disable personalization without losing the possibility to add tiles to My Home? maybe I'm doing it the wrong way

Thanks!

Andreea

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: I came in through the acquisition of Quadrem by Ariba and subsequently the acquisition of Ariba by SAP. However the first time I heard the 3 letter word SAP was in my first job with Accenture where SAP skills were highly prized for career growth.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @Geeta_Menon hi (again), I live in the suburbs of Philadelphia. Similar to Newtown Square there is a location group Dallas - SAP Community. I didn't mention before that if you aren't yet aware and you may want to join. It is fun to run a SAP Stammtisch (informal) meetup with you local Dallas fellow community members!

entry.title: Re: New to the SAP Community? A friend of someone already here?
entry.content:
welcome to the group, nice to virtually meet you - join our local group  https://community.sap.com/t5/dallas/gh-p/dallas

stay tuned for our next get together, code jam or meet up to share knowledge and network with other Dallas people.

entry.title: Re: Service doesn't update after data model updating
entry.content: Thank you, very much!

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: I am looking forward to engaging with the SAP community

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @Geeta_Menon hi (again!!) I joined SAP from a customer to become a BW support consultant. I was a supply chain manager using MM. I must say working as a BW support consultant I was able to get a good perspective on the different SAP modules. I am familiar with Ariba from a user perspective.

entry.title: Re: Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) wi...
entry.content:
Hi @TillHeinen,

Have you gone through the following mission and tutorial already?

https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-aibus-shape-ml-custom.html

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-aibus-dox-ui-gen-ai.html

Please review it and check the following note as well:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3442582/E

I don't believe you can enhance the DOX SDK. You use it as is. Basically to use genAI with DOX you create a custom schema, data types for a custom document type (via UI or APIs). Then, DOX uses the genAI to extract the data based on the inputs you've given.

This is a typical use-case (and one of the earliest ones) of embedding AI in SAP standard solutions.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: How to upload huge records from Excel to Database tab...
entry.content: Yes it is 100 thousands.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @davidisaksson it is awesome to hear your enthusiasm. Do you have topics of interest where you plan to engage in the community? Have you checked out the interest groups? Probably there is something for everyone!

entry.title: 2024 Events
entry.content:
hello Dallas group, 

with 6 new members this year and almost at the end of the first quarter of 2024, it is time to start thinking about what events (knowledge sharing, social or both) would you like to help with, participate or suggest for this year... we should have enough people to do something again this year. Feel free to suggest or lead one of them.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @markus_schaefer242 great to meet you. You have experienced quite a career with SAP. Not sure if you would be interested in sharing career highlights Career Corner - SAP Community? There is so much to learn about SAP careers. The best to is to here SAPers real-life journeys. 😁

entry.title: Re: Wildfly resource adapter for SAP JRA and sapjco3
entry.content:
Hi, 

A JRA for JCo3 provided by SAP does exist only within NetWeaver Application Server Java. For other environments, there is none. It makes much more sense do natively use the JCo API. The generic APIs often don't fit to the models of JCo. Therefore, I strongly recommend that you look into this direction

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @OlgaSchwEcke wow what a (career) journey. It is fun that you have so much fun and success. Would be awesome if you want to share highlights Career Corner - SAP Community. Wish you luck and see you here in the community!

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @Samudra I'm so impressed. You touch the very roots of SAP with ABAP. I can't think of anything more rewarding. Any chance you would share your career journey in the Career Corner - SAP Community? So many may want to pursue solution architecture and they are not sure where / how to get started. 😆Best of luck.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP

entry.title: Re: SAP Commissions on Hyperscaler - 🛠️Setup your own sFTP Key as Self Service
entry.content: Puttygen does not create the correct format of the key - use the ssh-keygen method to create the SSH keys.  I do not use a passphrase when setting up the keys.  Once you create the public key, you should be able to upload it into XDL without the format error.

entry.title: Re: Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant
entry.content:
Hello ManuelaCristian,

This means that you have transitioned the old certification C_S4CMA to the new certification C_S4CPB. Which shows that you gained additional knowledge in implementing S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. With the Record of Achievement for Manufacturing you are showing that you have in addition kept your Manufacturing knowledge up-to-date.

Thank you for staying current and certified!

Best regards, Dieter

entry.title: Re: Replace a Model in the Optimized (Unified) Experience
entry.content:
Dear Tunir,
Thank you for great Blog. I would have one question. Will this functionality work also for Live Data Model or only for Imported Model?
Thanks in advance,
Andrej

entry.title: How to change the form title of the dunning notice output
entry.content:
We would like to change the form title of the dunning notice.

For billing document form title we can do via SSCUI 102402 Define Billing Types for Sales.

(KBA 3004546 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3004546)

But where I can do the same for dunning notice and letter?

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: Integration between Ariba and SAP MM was a key value proposition for our customers. So I can see why you would have been familiar with Ariba as a supply chain mgr.

entry.title: SF- ODATA API - Query _ SAP CPI Integrations
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are quering ODATA API in successfactor with below filter condition in CPI SuccessFactor ODATA ADAPTER processing.

$select=firstName,lastName,gender,empInfo/personNav/nationalIdNav/nationalId,empInfo/personNav/nationalIdNav/countryNav/territoryName,empInfo/personNav/nationalIdNav/personNav/emailNav/emailType,empInfo/personNav/dateOfBirth&$filter=(empInfo/jobInfoNav/lastModifiedDateTime ge datetime'${property.LastRunDate}' or empInfo/personNav/personalInfoNav/lastModifiedDateTime ge datetime'${property.LastRunDate}') and empInfo/jobInfoNav/event ne '4434

where is want to have the query filter as considering all the filter outside as 'AND' condition and the one in round braces- I want to fetch delta data from both personal data and employment data but not where both are present at the same time.

I am trying to fetch delta data from different entities in SF but the condititon that not all entities are modified at the same time and want to have the condition work for the entities. 

Can anyone help me in this?

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi Dinesh,

Try issuing the command I have in the guide, but omit the --interactive flag. You will then be invited to select individual packages. Look for the one you're trying to add in that list.

Cheers,

Pierre

entry.title: Multi-tenancy through Managed Approuter with the SAP Launchpad / SAP Build Work Zone Service
entry.content:
Hello,

I am reviewing the SAP Build Work Zone service. See SAP documentation here.

Specifically I am interested in using the service to host multi-tenant based applications. Currently, this is possible through the Cloud Foundry environment using a standalone approuter. Can the same be achieved through the managed approuter available as part of the SAP Build Work Zone service? If yes, what does the configuration look like? For example, apply the same SaaS config (ex: getDependencies), XSUAA config (ex: "tenant-mode":"shared") and xs-app.json config (ex: TENANT_HOST_PATTERN) to the SAP Build Work Zone services. 

I found mentions that this was not supported as part of the SAP Launchpad service (see here). SAP Build Work Zone is a rebrand of Launchpad, so it's unclear if this feature is now available.

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 

Thank you!

Dominick

entry.title: Assignment Profiles - Removing curricula without removing existing assignments
entry.content:
Hi all, I have a query around assignment profiles - does anyone know if there is a way to achieve the below?

Let's say we currently have an assignment profile with various curricula linked to it. We no longer want people to be assigned one of the curricula, but we don't want to unassign it from people who have it already. We just don't want any 'newcomers' who fall into that AP to be assigned it, if that makes sense. Is there a way to do this?

entry.title: AR invoice import via DTW (Invalid record offset)
entry.content:
Hi there,

I’m a new member of SAP community, I tried to import AR invoices linked to Sale order via DTW facing error code invalid record offset (ODBC-2010/65171). Also, I’m using SAP Business one 10.0 with SQL server 2017. In line document template, I used sale order number and line as references in base type base entry base line to create relationship map and got these errors.

I’m looking for relevant post and solutions to solve it but cannot find any help regarding this error. If any expert member see my inquiry here, please give me some solutions.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Target Cost in CO-production order
entry.content: KKPAN my friend.  Award points.  Also, maintain target settings in variance control configuration for the controlling area.

entry.title: Extract data from DIRECT UPDATE ADSO using REQUEST TSN
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to extract data from a DIRECT UPDATE using the REQUEST TSN?

For example here I only wanted to extract the 2nd request which is the 2024-02-19 18:33:58.

Is it possible? How to set that filter?

Thanks.

Loed

C_ACT SAP Certified Associate – Project Manager SAP Activate is the successor of ACTIVATE. 
Please access our Get your SAP Certifications ready for tomorrow’s world site and information on the new SAP Certification program. 
You can also access the SAP Certification Recommendation documentation to understand how your certification will be affected with the upcoming SAP Certification program changes and what you will need to do to stay certified.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Best way to generate Microsoft Word docx from ABAP
entry.content:
Hi @antonsikidin, first of all thanks for the solution, it's working great for me!

I have a requirement to repeat template n times in the same document. Is it possible to generate multiple repeating pages in one docx using your solution?

Thanks!

entry.title: Depreciation Beyond Useful Life of an Asset
entry.content:
Issue: Depreciation  calculation beyond 8 years (96 month or 192 half month period) which suppose to end 31st Aug 2029 but system is planning till 30 June 2030.

Asset Initial Acquisition is on 12/31/2021 for 186,033.50 and Asset value date 12/31/2021

Useful life 8 years

Original Depreciation start date 09/01/2021

Addition during the year 2024

Asset Addition on 02/29/2024 amounting $111,002.00 and relevant Asset Value date 02/29/2024

Dep Key : LINA    

Base Method : 007     percentage from Life

Depreciation posted in Feb 2024  is amounting $ 4250.39    instead of 33,531.85

Excess planned depreciation $33,531.85 posted between 09/01/2029 to 07/31/2030

 Question : How to Depreciate entire Asset value of assets including additions in subsequent years within 8 years of useful life. 

I tried to Change base method from Yes to No  as below 

Depreciation After End of Planned Life

Set this indicator, if you want the system to continue depreciation after the end of the planned useful life.

 still system is not zero-out entire NBV after end of useful life 8 years which leaves $13,248.50 balance in NBV.

Please advice.

entry.title: Updating an SAP HANA System Landscape - Overview
entry.content:
Updating an SAP HANA System Landscape - Overview

 Revision Update

  1. Support Packages (SPS) Update
  2. Version Upgrade – SAP HANA 1.0 to SAP HANA 2.0

SAP HANA system components like,

  • SAP HANA Database
  • SAP HANA client
  • SAP HANA studio

Additional system components like,

  • Application Function Libraries (AFL, EML and the product-specific AFLs IBP, RTL, TRP, VCH, XRP)
  • SAP liveCache applications (SAP LCA or LCAPPS plug-in)
  • SAP HANA EPM-MDS (EPMMDS plug-in)
  • XS advanced runtime applications
  • SAP HANA smart data access (SDA)
  • SAP HANA XS Advanced Runtime

Above components can be updated using the SAP HANA database lifecycle manager (HDBLCM)

 

To update an SAP HANA system, we need to first download the individual components from Service Marketplace (SMP). This can be done manually download.

 

Prerequisite:

 

  1. Before starting the update for the components in your SAP HANA landscape several prerequisites have to be fulfilled.

 Make sure you fulfil the following prerequisites:

  • If you are performing an offline update, you have all the necessary installation files for the individual components.
  • You have a valid, permanent SAP license for the SAP HANA database.
  • You have user names and passwords for the following users:
    • <sid>adm user
    • sapadm user
    • S-user for the SAP Support Portal
  • You have carefully read the update instructions for the individual components.
  • You have made the necessary preparations to perform backups for the SAP HANA database and the other components.

 

  1. Check you planned SAP Hana Target Version & Current Operating System Version. If required OS Upgrade for Target Planned SAP HANA version first Upgrade OS.

 

Upgrade the Operating System

The different versions of the SAP HANA Platform are only supported on specific operating system versions. For information about supported operating system versions for SAP HANA, see "SAP Note 2235581 - SAP HANA: Supported Operating Systems".

When updating to SAP HANA Platform 2.0 SPS 00, you may need to upgrade the operating system. For information about the upgrade, refer to the documentation of the operating system vendor. For the operating system, we recommend that you choose a new installation as the upgrade procedure. We recommend the following procedures:

  • RHEL

For RHEL 7.2 we recommend a new installation.

  • SLES

For SLES 12 SP1 we recommend a new installation.

 

Here we example to take SAP HANA Database Component

Source System: 2.00.040.00 (Revision 40)

Target System: We planned to Update Revision 48

Source Version:

 

 

Software From Service Market Place with SAPCAR from Extract SAR File

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Start Resident HDBLCM from below location:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Target Version:

entry.title: Re: Customizing of GOS (Generic Object Service) working f...
entry.content:
Good Morning,

 

I have performed the following tests:

1. From SAPGUI, use transaction FB03.
I have not succeeded to upload a new Document with GOS has it is deactivated.

2. From Fiori Launchpad, I have used Manage Journal Entry (AccountingDocument-manage)
---
Manage Journal Entry (AccountingDocument-manage)
-> Provide the Journal Entry
--> Go
---> Click on the Journal Entry
----> Manage Journal Entries
-----> Click on Attachments
------> Click on Edit
-------> Click on Upload
--------> Provide the PDF File
---------> A new document is added using GOS
---

Does this describes enough for you to understand?

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
HI everyone, i'm from Chile I, currently living in Osorno.
Osorno is quite an agricultural city, but I like the calm and country vibe. I´m Leader of SAP PM in my Organization, but a User level.

entry.title: Manage FMEAs (F4340) is missing the "Analysis" Tab
entry.content:
Hi all,

Being on S/4 2023 initial shipment stack and I've activated the Odata and sicf services of  Manage FMEAs (F4340). ( https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4340')/S28OP )

and the app opens alright.. but I'm missing the "Analysis" tab and all the functionality if gives like the graphical view. Does it require any special roles or other services? Can't see any messages in browser Dev Tools that stick out nor in the Appslibrary. What am I missing?

I've attached 2 pics "apps_lib.jpg" displaying the missing analysis tab and "current".jpg" how it looks currently (no analysis tab)

regards

Christian

entry.title: Re: New! Check on one single page all of your Identity Authentication and Identity Provisioning tena
entry.content:
I was following KBA (2791410 - Integrating SuccessFactors with Identity Authentication IAS through the Upgrade Center)  and pasted exactly what it said to put in the filter field "status eq 'active' " except below for context:

" On IPS, update sf.user.filter field as this is a filter of the users that will be read by IPS on SuccessFactors.

  • When created, this field will come with value status eq 'active' and username in 'sf_username1_placeholder','sf_username2_placeholder'.
  • This means that only active users that are on the list will be synced (sf_username1_placeholder and sf_username2_placeholder).
  • You need to change the filter to sync usernames that exist on your instance as a test.
  • The filter should be only status eq 'active' for syncing all users to move forward on the implementation."

I then received this error: 

"Caused by: HTTP operation failed invoking https://api4preview.cert.sapsf.com/rest/iam/scim/v2/Users?startId=initial&count=100&filter=status%20eq%20'active' with statusCode: 400 and body {"schemas":["urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error"],"scimType":"invalidFilter","detail":"The filter expression is invalid.status eq 'active'","status":400} "

 

So the very text the KBA told me to enter as filter is cause an expression is invalid error. Where do I go from here?

entry.title: Re: Manage FMEAs (F4340) is missing the "Analysis" Tab
entry.content:
Hmm.. I can't see any of the attached pictures here.

*edit* nvmd edited and attached them again and it worked this time around.

entry.title: Associate multiple Keywords to a Category Via Impex
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm trying to associate via impex multiple keywords to a specific category. But I'm still facing some issues.

I create an impex using as guide the following post here in the community:
https://community.sap.com/t5/customer-relationship-management-q-a/how-to-insert-a-keyword-and-relate-it-to-a-product-via-impex/qaq-p/12075474

My impex is :

----

$productCatalog=dcCommProductCatalog
$productCV=catalogVersion(catalog(id[default=$productCatalog]),version[default='Staged'])[unique=true,default=$productCatalog:Staged]
$lang=Language(isocode)[default='it']
$category=source(code, $productCV)
$keyword=target(keyword, $lang, $productCV)

INSERT_UPDATE Category2KeywordRelation;qualifier[unique=true];$category;$keyword;$lang[unique=true]
;271;A pressione:en;it
;271;A scomparti:en;it

-----

As result, I can only add one of the two keywords to a specific category. How can I modify the impex to achieve my goal? Note that I'm using SAP Hybris 6.5.

Thanks in advance for any suggestion

I've been a SAP back office user for a couple decades and I have honestly fallen in love with it.   I have decided to take the steps to changing my career mid-path, and become an IT SAP employee.   I would love to be efficient with SAP products of all kinds and hope to start my research here.  This is honestly a little exciting and scary at the same time, but I am dedicated to being successful at this.

entry.title: Re: Notifications for broadcasting of Reports
entry.content:
Dear Chindhu, how are you?

No, currently there is no way to trigger/set up notifications of those broadcast jobs. Each broadcast execution needs to be checked manually under Business Analytics > Broadcast work center view.  

For additional reference, you may refer to these documents:

  • If using SAP Cloud for Customer: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_FOR_CUSTOMER/66e9a9081a7b40e38c8604d6617d0311/3a6fd563d8ca4d26bdf9d1369ca63652.html?q=broadcast
  • If using SAP Business ByDesign: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/6a397f0ff927452d8f88f7488fd31685.html?q=broadcast#create-a-broadcast 

 

Thanks and best regards,

Igor

entry.title: Re: sap webide .xsjob
entry.content:
Please ignore this question. As I was able to figure out the issue 

thanks

entry.title: Configuring SAP for Two Types of Material Receipt Processes in a Warehouse and Storage Environment
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

Current situation:

We have a warehouse where most of our inventory is centralized.
This warehouse is located near our factory, but between the warehouse and the factory we have high-turnover stock storages to supply the factory.
We also have a small low-turnover stock at the factory, but it is not our focus to store there.

Requirement:

Based on the information above, we would like to know how to configure SAP with two processes that currently happen in the material receipt (purchasing) area, entering the stock in the warehouse or storage:
For high-turnover/priority processes: Materials are delivered directly to the storages, bypassing the warehouse due to the slow delivery and exit process to the factory.
For medium-turnover/priority processes: Materials are delivered to the warehouse, and after receipt and organization, when requested, they are sent to the storages and consequently to the factory.

Question:

How can we configure SAP with these two types of receipts without the need for ABAP programming or any type of configuration that a common user cannot do? (SAP ECC 6.0)

The goal is to find a solution that can be implemented by a regular user without the need for specialized technical knowledge.

entry.title: Re: Automatic Account Determination content download - S4...
entry.content:
I am a bit confused myself.

First I have to say sorry I did not explain myself when I said that it my system was not up to date. Of course I have a public cloud system with 2402 version. I said that because, believe me, I do not see what you tell me. And I have a user with all the catalogs so I don't think it is due to lack of authorizations (never say never though).

Consider that our company has two systems, the one I talked about, implemented in 2018 and another implemented in 2023. Both are missing that functionality.

entry.title: updating other line items when changing item value (ABAP Cloud, BTP, RAP)
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

when changing a line item value (e.g. item1-quantity) of a Business Object, I need to calculate another value for all line items (e.g.e Item1-price and Item2-price) and update all line items.

IDQuantityPrice
Item12 PC11,90 €
Item22 PC8,80 €

the calculation works fine but the new value of item2-price won't be displayed.

I created a determination in the Item (Child) BDEF.

 

  determination calculatePrice on modify { field Quantity; }
  side effects
   { field Quantity affects field Price; }

 

and the Implementation looks like

 

...some calculation... 
MODIFY ENTITIES OF zr_test IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY Item
        UPDATE FIELDS ( Price )
        WITH VALUE #( FOR item IN items INDEX INTO i
                      ( %tky              = item-%tky
                        Price          = item-Price ) ).

 

It seems that the side effect only works for the changed item1 but doesn't effect the values of other entities.

Does anyone know how to solve this issue?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Automatic Account Determination content download - S4...
entry.content: Thank you Dennis. I knew there was that file from other posts, but I wasn't able to find it in the process navigator.

entry.title: Re: Unified Analytics with SAP Datasphere & Databricks Lakehouse Platform- Data Federation Scenarios
entry.content:
Hi, @Vivek-RR!

 

Thanks so much for your blog!!

We're trying the configuration, but facing an issue on the connection. When Datasphere is fetching the preview data, it shows an jdbc error as the log below:

Caused by: com.databricks.client.support.exceptions.ErrorException: [Databricks][JDBCDriver](500051) ERROR processing query/statement. Error Code: 0, SQL state: 42601, Query: SELECT TOP***, Error message from Server: org.apache.hive.service.cli.HiveSQLException: Error running query: [PARSE_SYNTAX_ERROR] org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.parser.ParseException:
[PARSE_SYNTAX_ERROR] Syntax error at or near '1000'. SQLSTATE: 42601 (line 1, pos 11)

 

== SQL ==
SELECT TOP 1000  `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`id`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`armazem`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`centro_eva`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`codigo`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`codigo_lote`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`diretoria`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`gerencia_executiva`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`gerencia_geral`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`gestao_estoque`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`participacao_pb`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`tipo_processo`, `centro_dbrocks$VT`.`usuario` FROM `pgea`.`centro` `centro_dbrocks$VT`


We tried to use DBeaver and the select top also shows error.

There's any configuration to fix this?


Thanks in advance,
Marcelo Bruno.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi to everyone here. Although I was born in Bangladesh, I currently live in Malaysia. I work as a SAP FICO consultant at the moment. I now need to learn more about the latest updates from SAP S4hana.

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 2
entry.content:
I used the Rust SDK:

use cloudevents::{EventBuilder, EventBuilderV10};
use serde_json::json;
use http::request::Request;
use std::str;
use chrono::Utc;

fn main() {
    let now = Utc::now().to_rfc3339();
    let event = EventBuilderV10::new()
        .id("A234-1234-1234")
        .source("/myapp/resources/1234567890")
        .ty("com.example.myapp.resource.created")
        .time(now)
        .data(
            "application/json",
            json!({
                "resourceId": "1234567890",
                "resourceName": "My Resource",
                "resourceType": "myapp.com/resources"
            }),
        )
        .build()
        .unwrap();

    // Convert the event to a HTTP representation in binary content mode
    let http_request = Request::builder()
        .method("POST")
        .uri("http://example.com")
        .header("ce-specversion", "1.0")
        .header("ce-type", "com.example.myapp.resource.created")
        .header("ce-source", "/myapp/resources/1234567890")
        .header("ce-id", "A234-1234-1234")
        .header("ce-time", "2023-03-05T18:00:00Z")
        .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
        .body(serde_json::to_vec(&event).unwrap())
        .unwrap();

    // Print out the HTTP request
    println!("HTTP Method: {}", http_request.method());
    println!("URI: {}", http_request.uri());
    for (key, value) in http_request.headers() {
        println!("Header: {}={}", key, value.to_str().unwrap());
    }
    println!("Body: {}", str::from_utf8(http_request.body()).unwrap());
}

The results:

entry.title: Re: Why plan order of VSF decimal from MD04?
entry.content:
Hello

That looks weird. 

Do you have any BAdI implemented that might be affecting those quantities (maybe MD_ADD_ELEMENTS or MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA)?

Do you see those quantities in the planned order tables or is it just in MD04?

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: apply security rules from SECPOL
entry.content:
Translator
 
 
 
 

 

Good morning dear, I am a newbie in SAP and we apply a module to

automatically generate keys, my question is how can I apply the security policies that I have in SECPOL.
I attach a screenshot of the module code and the input when executing it.

I tried to put in the "SECURITY_POLICY" input the name of the group created in SECPOL
but it doesn't work.
Sorry I'm new to ABAP.

Thank you
